metadata.name: beta1_smile
metadata.description: Lognormal SABR (beta=1) smile across five strikes ITM/ATM/OTM. Locks the Task-1 Hagan (1-beta) exponent fix for the equity/lognormal case.
metadata.source_detail: Hagan et al. (2002) 'Managing Smile Risk', Wilmott Magazine, eq. 2.17a/2.18. For beta=1: z = (nu/alpha)*ln(F/K); chi(z) = ln((sqrt(1-2*rho*z+z^2)+z-rho)/(1-rho)); factor1 = alpha (since F_mid^(1-beta)=1); factor2 = z/chi(z); time_correction = 0.25*rho*beta*nu*alpha + (2-3*rho^2)*nu^2/24; vol = factor1*factor2*(1+T*time_correction). With Obloj (2008) arXiv:0708.0998v2 corrected z for the z/chi(z) ratio (z already exact for beta=1). Derived independently in Python from first principles; NOT copied from SABRModel output. Parameters: alpha=0.20, beta=1.0, nu=0.30, rho=-0.20, F=100, T=1.0. Manual derivation for K=80: z=0.334715326971315, chi(z)=0.319013215991865, factor1=0.200000, factor2=1.049220879237335, rho_term=-0.003, nu_term=0.00705, time_correction=0.00405, factor3=1.00405, vol=0.210694044759649.

vol_k100.tolerance_reason: ATM case uses eq. 2.18 directly; exact
